# Testing in Multiple Regression Models (1) {testing-multiple-regression-1}

```{r testing-multiple-regression-1-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/testing-multiple-regression-1-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/testing-multiple-regression-1/"
)
```

```{r child-testing-multiple-regression-1, child="../lecture-content/10-testing-multiple-regression-1.Rmd"}
```
